gxio/mica_queue.h File Reference

An API for allocating and manipulating MiCA Queues. More...


Data Structures

struct  gxio_mica_result_t
 gxio_mica_result_t More...
struct  mica_ctxt_req_t
 mica_ctxt_req_t More...
struct  mica_queue_stats_t
 Record for receiving mica_queue stats. More...

Defines

#define MAX_MICA_SHIM_IDX   1
 1 for GX
#define MAX_CONTEXTS_PER_QUEUE   16
 Max num of HW contexts per mica queue.
#define MAX_RESULT_FIFO_CNT   16
 Max num result fifos per mica queue.
#define UNINITIALIZED_QUEUE_ERR   -1991
 Use of closed queue in an API call.
#define REQUEST_QUEUE_FULL   -1992
 Op rejected bceause queue was full.
#define QUEUE_OP_TIMEOUT_ERR   -1993
 Operation timed out.
#define SHARED_MICA_QUEUE   0x01
 Share the mica_queue across threads.
#define SHARED_RESULT_FIFO   0x02
 Allow multiple result fifos.
#define USE_COMPLETION_INTERRUPT   0x08
 Use Interrupts. NOT YET IMPLEMENTED.

Typedefs

typedef struct gxio_mica_queue_s gxio_mica_queue_t
 gxio_mica_queue_t
typedef
gxio_mica_accelerator_type_t 		gxio_mica_kind_t
 gxio_mica_kind_t
typedef uint32_t mica_queue_flags_t
 Mica_queue flags.

Functions

uint32_t gxio_mica_queue_count (uint32_t num_of_threads, uint32_t num_mica_contexts)
 Determine the suggested number of mica_queues to use.
uint32_t gxio_mica_queue_split_ctxt_request (mica_ctxt_req_t *total_ctxt_request, uint32_t num_of_queues, mica_ctxt_req_t ctxt_requests[])
 Split a total ctxt_request into N pieces.
uint32_t gxio_mica_queue_mem_size (gxio_mica_kind_t type, uint32_t req_fifo_entries, uint32_t result_fifo_cnt, uint32_t result_fifo_entries, mica_ctxt_req_t *ctxt_request, mica_queue_flags_t queue_flags)
 Determine the mica_queue memory size.
gxio_mica_queue_t * gxio_mica_create_queue (void *mem_ptr, uint32_t mem_size, gxio_mica_kind_t type, uint32_t req_fifo_entries, uint32_t result_fifo_cnt, uint32_t result_fifo_entries, mica_ctxt_req_t *ctxt_request, mica_queue_flags_t queue_flags)
 Initialize a mica_queue.
int32_t gxio_reserve_result_fifo (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue)
 Reserve a free result fifo.
int gxio_mica_destroy_queue (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue)
 Destroy a mica_queue.
int gxio_mica_queue_register_page (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue, void *page, size_t page_size, uint32_t page_flags)
 Register a page with a mica sofware queue.
int gxio_mica_queue_op (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue, uint32_t result_fifo_idx, void *src, void *dst, void *extra_data, gxio_mica_opcode_t opcode, void *user_ptr)
 Queue a MiCA operation (asynchronously - i.e.
int gxio_mica_queue_sync_op (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue, uint32_t result_fifo_idx, void *src, void *dst, void *extra_data, gxio_mica_opcode_t opcode, uint64_t max_cycles, uint64_t *context_status)
 Synchronous version of gxio_mica_queue_op.
uint32_t gxio_mica_queue_poll (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue, uint32_t result_fifo_idx)
 Queue Polling.
int gxio_mica_get_result (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue, uint32_t result_fifo_idx, gxio_mica_result_t *result_ptr)
 Get the next mica_result from the completion of a MiCA operation.
void gxio_mica_queue_stats (gxio_mica_queue_t *queue, uint8_t clear_counters, mica_queue_stats_t *stats)
 Mica_queue statistics.

Detailed Description

An API for allocating and manipulating MiCA Queues.
